creator: dteske@FreeBSD.org
text:
I committed SVN r334303 (link below) to make sysrc handle this more gracefully.
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=334303

Cross-reference with https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=187461

It's coming up on MFC to stable/11 -- scheduled for Tue, Jun 26 -- and additional feedback is welcome.
